name: schools
description: School autocomplete/lookup namespace. Use to resolve school names to canonical education IDs before querying the people-education prefilter namespace.

attributes.name: canonical_key
attributes.notes: Normalized school identity key for dedup.

rules: Use this only to resolve names like Stanford, MIT, Berkeley to school IDs.
Use aleph_people_education_v1 for person base-ID prefiltering after IDs are resolved.
